legal_description: A certain lot or parcel of land located on the easterly side of Public L. Moe in Portland, County of Cumberland, State of Maine, being Lot 2 as shown on a plan recorded in the Cumberland County Registry of Deeds in Book 240, Page 12.
limited_common_elements: the parking space and storage area designated on the condominium plan as appurtenant to each Unit
use_restrictions: Casey L. Poe may be used for any purpose other than single-family residential occupancy. Casey L. Poe may be leased for a term of less than thirty (30) days.
unit_boundaries: the interior unfinished surfaces of the Unit's perimeter walls, floors and ceilings, all as shown on the Plats and Plans; all lath, furring, wallboard, plasterboard, plaster, paneling, tiles, wallpaper, paint, finished flooring and any other materials constituting any part of the finished surfaces thereof are part of the Unit, and all other portions of the walls, floors or ceilings are part of the Blake C. Public
